title: SPARQL Query Results JSON Format
description: JSON Schema for the SPARQL 1.1 Query Results JSON Format as defined by the W3C Recommendation. Covers SELECT query results with variable bindings and ASK query boolean results.

SelectResults.title: SPARQL SELECT Results
SelectResults.description: Results of a SPARQL SELECT query containing a head with variable names and a results object with an array of bindings.

AskResult.title: SPARQL ASK Result
AskResult.description: Result of a SPARQL ASK query containing a head and a boolean value indicating whether the query pattern matches.

boolean.description: True if the query pattern has at least one solution, false otherwise.

Head.title: Results Head
Head.description: Header section of the SPARQL results containing variable names and optional metadata links.

vars.description: Ordered list of variable names (without the leading '?') from the SELECT clause.

link.description: Array of URIs providing additional metadata about the results.

Results.title: Results Body
Results.description: Contains the array of solution bindings for a SELECT query.

bindings.description: Array of solution mappings. Each element maps variable names to RDF term descriptions.

Binding.title: Solution Binding
Binding.description: A single query solution mapping variable names to their bound RDF term values. Variables with no binding for a given solution are omitted.

RdfTerm.title: RDF Term
RdfTerm.description: An RDF term value in the SPARQL results, representing an IRI, literal, or blank node.

IriTerm.title: IRI Term
IriTerm.description: An RDF IRI (Internationalized Resource Identifier) reference.

type.description: Indicates this term is an IRI.

LiteralTerm.title: Literal Term
LiteralTerm.description: An RDF literal value, optionally with a language tag or datatype IRI.

type.description: Indicates this term is a literal. 'typed-literal' is used for backward compatibility.

value.description: The lexical form of the literal.

datatype.description: Datatype IRI for typed literals (e.g., xsd:integer, xsd:dateTime).

BlankNodeTerm.title: Blank Node Term
BlankNodeTerm.description: An RDF blank node with a locally-scoped identifier.

type.description: Indicates this term is a blank node.

value.description: A blank node identifier, scoped to the results document.
